variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17677 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17677 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17677 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 199.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 165.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 117.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 347.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 336.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 308.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25501 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17677
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF25501 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17677
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25501 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
